# How i got $15000 Reward by Apple - Information Disclosure

******﷽**** __**  
  
It's been quite long time i wrote a blog, Today i would like to disclose one of my findings in Apple which was reported via Apple bug bounty program.  
  
While browsing through the Apple subdomains i came across a subdomain which is a tool used by Apple and it's customers.

After login to the tool and going through the application, i came across different vulnerable endpoints where changing the id (which was numeric value) led me to information disclosure (email address) such as @apple.com , @bbc.com and other customers email addresses . I was able to fetch millions of email addresses using this vulnerability.  

  

Below are few of the screenshots where data was leaking.  

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Apple customer @bbc emails leaking screenshot.  

![](data:image/png;base64,***REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY***FYCIdXjnG+Eoh0tku37NiDw8xUiLgC8ZXiwYxaIIAI4yAWXOPSfJGPq1m1bkZDN2mNWJJYiVJriSKmKDfEGOvAZE2i0kAnsldZNV62Swkk6CxYn7Yeq1NXj7ITrkGVkks6wu7SveQjksDiJyD/Dbf4j7GcoSQgCUgCko***REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY***vEWSHISlH26h0I2dMiISCcnP45FC//RJjUeQWIUkiOzrJA12yGG6XoG6Ywq5vpToL1Qmu8dqrM8VAXly60kcvxSgKSgCQgCUgCko***REDACTED-AWS-KEY***UmMGthVjhllQI9V3kgsjtJQBBwBd3o9vSgy21HJqumZ7PavFEbhz7/IGoH65Wq6pWJZUg0WKFmAR/ZPhoC6uJyRH1ehOdQmEWQjtm6cyPCNiuHL8qm1UJVUARVWsainJ6c1J+OQJ9/AB3D3QhE/Lx2ZiDbxHOM6SONzlZeU+0ws4hcVVKFUiiOtwf+dAOVrywJSAKSgCQgCUgCko***REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY******REDACTED-AWS-KEY***)  

  

  

  

Apple was quick in fixing these issues, they rewarded total $15000 USD .

![](data:image/png;base64,)

That's all for today, will disclose more writeups in future :) 

Thanks

Haji
